note: GENERATED by tools/build_source_registry.py from in-code source configs. Do not hand-edit; edit the owning extractor's config.

sources.name: Charities Public Register
sources.caveat: manual/semi-manual XLSX drop; refresh at least twice a year

sources.name: CRO bulk company register
sources.caveat: CKAN daily zip; fetched + validated by cro_poller.py

sources.name: CRO financial-statements filing index
sources.caveat: CKAN filing index (figures paywalled); sandbox extractor, not yet pipeline-wired

sources.name: HSE
sources.caveat: listing from seed; runtime parser resolves the file URL from an ephemeral probe JSON — promote that before wiring to pipeline

sources.name: Tusla
sources.caveat: listing from seed; runtime parser resolves the file URL from an ephemeral probe JSON — promote that before wiring to pipeline

sources.name: C&AG publications index (RoAPS chapters, special reports, appropriation accounts)
sources.caveat: CC-BY-4.0. No RSS — poll the index for new entries.

sources.name: HIQA — IPAS centre inspection reports
sources.caveat: NOT CLOUD-SAFE (gov.ie-family CDN 403s datacenter IPs; local/edge lane only, browser UA + Referer, pace >=5s). hiqa.ie rate-limits: sends Retry-After: 0 (floor it to your own backoff) and throttles bursts. Individual reports NAME THE PROVIDER — the only source that does. Provider names inherit the accommodation-providers public_display gate.

sources.name: IGEES — Managing IPAS Expenditure Pressures (analytical paper)
sources.caveat: NOT CLOUD-SAFE (gov.ie-family CDN 403s datacenter IPs; local/edge lane only, browser UA + Referer, pace >=5s). Origin of the EUR 92/night private vs EUR 34/night State-owned figures.

sources.name: Comprehensive Accommodation Strategy for International Protection Applicants
sources.caveat: NOT CLOUD-SAFE (gov.ie-family CDN 403s datacenter IPs; local/edge lane only, browser UA + Referer, pace >=5s). Contains the State's own admission that it cannot meet its Reg 4 obligation.

sources.name: National Standards for accommodation offered to people in the protection process
sources.caveat: NOT CLOUD-SAFE (gov.ie-family CDN 403s datacenter IPs; local/edge lane only, browser UA + Referer, pace >=5s). The 10 themes / 40 standards HIQA judges against. Per SI 649/2023 these are merely 'published on a website maintained by the Minister' — changeable without an SI, so a silent revision IS possible. Hash-watch it.

sources.name: IPAS weekly accommodation & arrivals statistics
sources.caveat: NOT CLOUD-SAFE (gov.ie-family CDN 403s datacenter IPs; local/edge lane only, browser UA + Referer, pace >=5s). assets.gov.ie WAF: browser UA + gov.ie Referer required; datacenter IPs 403. The per-LOCAL-AUTHORITY table is the county-map source (sums exactly to its own Grand Total). NOTE: the report NEVER publishes the unaccommodated count.

sources.name: Dún Laoghaire-Rathdown

sources.name: Donegal
sources.caveat: yearly (not quarterly) PDFs at /media/{code}/{YYYY}.pdf; leading PO#/ID prefix stripped

sources.name: Dublin City
sources.caveat: RE-CONFIRMED non-publisher 2026-06-08 (the biggest LA, but it does NOT publish a supplier-level PO/payments-over-€20k SPEND list). Its procurement page carries only policy PDFs + a stale 2018 'List_of_Contracts_Awarded_over_€25000.xls' (AWARD grain, ceilings — belongs to the awards lane, never the payments fact). data.gov.ie has only the AGGREGATE prompt-payment schedule (quarterly invoice TOTALS, not supplier-level). Real coverage gap, structural — not a sourcing miss.

sources.name: Fingal
sources.caveat: cols SupplierID(T)|Acc element(T)|Amount(C); landing links no PO files. Current files publish supplier NAMES (BUSHELL INTERIORS LTD, ENERGIA…), not bare codes — supplier_is_id left False so names classify normally (per-row ID_CODE_RE still catches stray codes)

sources.name: Galway City
sources.caveat: amount is the LAST column (handled by rightmost-money pick); budgets page mixes prompt-pay

sources.name: Galway County
sources.caveat: gaillimh.ie alt domain unblocks the galwaycoco WAF listing

sources.name: Kilkenny
sources.caveat: amounts stored NEGATIVE (debit sign) → abs(); supplier col 'Ap/Ar ID(T)' resolved by content-fallback

sources.name: Laois
sources.caveat: 'Procurement Report' grain; guard drops total-row mis-grabs (€397m artefact). Files orphaned (unlinked) → direct= seeds; cols Supplier|Description|Total

sources.name: Leitrim
sources.caveat: finance page also lists a prompt-pay AGGREGATE return → aggregate_guard skips 1-row files

sources.name: Limerick
sources.caveat: row carries a Paid column. Live site keeps ONLY the current quarter (prunes the rest) → 2016-2023 back-catalogue seeded from Internet Archive snapshots (LIMERICK_WAYBACK)

sources.name: Mayo
sources.caveat: getattachment/{GUID}/attachment.aspx (dateless URL, basename collides) → anchor_listing harvest: enumerate all quarterly PDFs from listing HTML, period from link text 'Quarter N YYYY'. Full back-catalogue (2016+); leading PO#/ID prefix stripped

sources.name: Dept of Public Expenditure, Infrastructure, PSR and Digitalisation
sources.caveat: DPENDR+OGCIO+OGP PO-over-20000 listing; note the SEPARATE pre-existing bug that the Dept Climate gov.ie collection mis-serves a 'DPER_Payments_over_20K' file (filename/dept mismatch) — that is payment-grain and ingested under dept_climate, distinct from these POs

sources.name: Department of Education and Youth
sources.caveat: Payments-of-20000-or-over quarterly PDFs, 2013-present (one 2023 quarter also offers xlsx)

sources.name: Department of Enterprise, Tourism and Employment
sources.caveat: DETE 'Payments over €20,000'; XLSX only (2024-2026 + 2017). Amount col is 'Total' (the 'Payment Number' ref matches the amount regex via 'payment' but is excluded by NON_AMOUNT_HDR). The older quarterly PDFs (2016-2025) are DEFERRED: merged 'Supplier Name Total (€)' header + inconsistent line-wrapping corrupt the supplier column under the generic word-geometry reader (amount parses fine, supplier becomes 'DELL (IRELAND) 84,255') — would need a bespoke reading-order parser

sources.name: Department of Housing, Local Government and Heritage
sources.caveat: prior sample was a privacy statement; gov.ie payments collection. OWNED BY THE disclosed_bq lane (disclosed_bq_po_newbodies_fact, full 2014-2025 clean) — NOT wired here.

sources.name: National Treasury Management Agency (NTMA)
sources.caveat: one quarterly scheme covers 6 business units incl NDFA (ADM/Nat-Debt/ISIF/NDFA/FIF/ICNF); do NOT also wire ie_ndfa or its rows double-count. The 6-row 'Revised-FOI-Publication' / '*-Publication.pdf' files are per-unit SUMMARIES (different grain) that overlap the line-level Q*-Payments files in 2018-19 — excluded to avoid double-counting. NOTE: the per-unit Q1-2020..Q2-2024 PDFs currently parse to 0 rows (layout/scan break) — known gap.

sources.name: Pobal
sources.caveat: grant-adjacent (privacy=medium); harvest returns oldest-first so a low --max-files biases to 2020 — raise --max-files for full series
